name: Lemon Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Empty one can of fruit with all its juice into a bowl.
2. Pour the pudding mix over it.
3. Add the next can of fruit, but only half its juice.
4. Mix well. If it's too thick, add some of the reserved juice.
(Optional - Mix in coconut).
5. Refrigerate until cold and enjoy!
